title: Mind control device
content:
{{Top|leg}}
[[File:Taxer2.jpg|thumb|Sundown's mind control device (after being disabled by [[Orin Bold]]).]]

A '''mind control device''' was a [[brain-wave projection]]<ref name="btr">{{Wizards|url=starwars/article.asp?x=sw20020411crise&c=rpg|text=Before the Rise}}</ref> machine that allowed its user to bend the will of others, much like [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] and other [[Force-sensitive/Legends|Force-users]] could do with [[The Force/Legends|the Force]]. It was worn about the head in a manner similar to a circlet or crown, and was small enough to be concealed by many headdresses. The first known mind-control devices were commissioned by the [[Baroness/Legends|Baroness]] [[Omnino]] in the years leading up to [[37 BBY/Legends|37 BBY]] as part of her plot against the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] and the Jedi. They were used by her and her [[Lieutenant/Legends|lieutenant]], [[Taxer Sundown]].

==Appearances==
*[[Qui-Gon and Obi-Wan: Last Stand on Ord Mantell 3|''Qui-Gon and Obi-Wan: Last Stand on Ord Mantell'' 3]]
